objective: Add a small GET /livez endpoint to the FastAPI in-memory task-board API. The endpoint must return exactly {"live": true}. Add pytest coverage and keep all existing tests passing. This task validates that future Web/OpenClaw adapter tasks automatically create an ORIS evidence commit index.
constraints: Do not ask the human for routine engineering decisions.
Use the existing FastAPI app in app/main.py.
Keep the implementation minimal and deterministic.
Do not change existing endpoint semantics.
Do not commit .env, credentials, private keys, .venv, caches, browser profiles, or runtime queue JSON.
Produce strict autonomous result schema and fresh skill resolver evidence.
notes: Submitted through Web/OpenClaw adapter to validate automatic evidence commit indexing for future tasks.
